## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change and why? If it fixes an open issue, write "Fixes #N" or "Closes #N" here. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to change)
- [ ] Documentation update

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read [CONTRIBUTING.md](./CONTRIBUTING.md).
- [ ] `go test -race ./...` passes locally.
- [ ] `go test -cover ./...` shows 100% coverage (or every new line is covered by a new test).
- [ ] `go vet ./...` is clean.
- [ ] Public API changes are reflected in the README and have a doc comment.
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` is updated under `## [Unreleased]`.
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings.
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes.
- [ ] Any dependent changes have been merged and published in downstream modules.
- [ ] If my change requires a change to the documentation, I have updated it accordingly.

If you're unsure about any of these, don't hesitate to ask.
